title: stipa caucasica subsp. drobovii
intro: Stipa caucasica subsp. drobovii, also known as Caucasian feather grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stipa caucasica subsp. drobovii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
